title: The Ritchfork Bayou
description: You buy a train ticket, leading you in a desolate place. Ravaged by time and misery, something feels odd. Is there more than meets the eye?
body:
## 1896, Southern Louisiana. 
 

**The Ritchfork Bayou. That name just catches your attention. There's something waiting for you in the swamps. Well, that's what you reckoned as you took the earliest train leading you right in it. There's no turning back now.**

_Warning : until the Bayou is fully prepared to welcome guests, train tickets to the swamps are exclusive to founders* and patrons who donated either on Twitch or Patreon._

With this modpack, you get yourself a way inside a fictional recreation of the Louisiana Bayous, filled with iconic points of interests such as a 1800s American town or a manor abandoned at the southernmost point of the bayou. Each landmark is scattered throughout handcrafted biomes filled with all sorts of accurate foliage. The Ritchfork Bayou is built upon the Conquest Refabricated Mod which add +12000 different blocks and textures, along with Create which helps create moving vehicles such as trains and upcoming carts & wagons.

Visiting the swamps can be quite performance intensive, so make sure to allocate sufficient RAM to better enjoy your stay. See you in the swamps!

- Discord : https://discord.gg/7ub9rVBQ3Q
- Twitch : https://www.twitch.tv/tomwhatthegeek
- Patreon : https://www.patreon.com/TheRitchforkBayou

Legal Disclaimer : All mods and resource packs used in this modpack (except the Ritchfork Overlay) were made and updated by third-party developers.

*People who joined the project within the 23rd of August 2022 and the 23rd of February 2023.
